name: Crazy Cake # 3
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: I Hate to Cookbook by Peg Bracken
Place the sifted flour in a bowl. Add cocoa, soda, sugar, and salt, then sift into a greased square cake pan (9x9x2 inches). Make three grooves in the dry mixture. Pour oil into one groove, vinegar into another, and vanilla into the third. Pour cold water over everything. Beat with a spoon until nearly smooth and no flour remains visible. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
